password_reset.subject: Reset your password
password_reset.lead: We received a request to reset your password. Click the link below to choose a new one:
password_reset.ignore: If you did not request this, you can safely ignore this email — your password will stay the same. The link expires in 1 hour.

email_verification.subject: Verify your email
email_verification.lead: Please confirm your email address by clicking the link below:

account_deletion.subject: Confirm account deletion
account_deletion.warning: We received a request to delete your account. This action is permanent.
account_deletion.confirm: If you really want to proceed, confirm via this link:
account_deletion.not_you: If this was not you, change your password immediately.
